title: Physical Activity from Questionnaire R0
description: Variables from the physical activity section of the first round of questionnaire for The Generations Study about the participant's history of exercise throughout different stages of life.

StudyID.description: Unique 6-digit identifier for each participant in the study.

R0_ChildhoodSportParticipation.x-question: Did you participate regularly in sporting activities outside school as a child?

R0_ChildhoodSportDaysWeek.x-question: If you participated regularly in sporting events outside school, on average, how many days per week did you participate in sports as a child? - days
R0_ChildhoodSportDaysWeek.description: Days per week spent on childhood sports

R0_ChildhoodSportHoursWeek.x-question: If you participated regularly in sporting events outside school, on average, how many days per week did you participate in sports as a child? - hours
R0_ChildhoodSportHoursWeek.description: Hours per week spent on childhood sports

R0_ChildhoodSportMinutesWeek.x-question: If you participated regularly in sporting events outside school, on average, how many days per week did you participate in sports as a child? - minutes
R0_ChildhoodSportMinutesWeek.description: Minutes per week spent on childhood sports

StrenuousExercise.description: Adult strenuous exercise history by age group

R0_StrenuousExerciseDays.x-question: As an adult, on how many days per week do you do strenuous exercise, ages [age range]?
R0_StrenuousExerciseDays.description: Weekly days of strenuous exercise ages [age range]

R0_StrenuousExerciseHours.x-question: Total time per week spent on strenuous exercise, ages [age range]? - hours
R0_StrenuousExerciseHours.description: Weekly hours of strenuous exercise ages [age range]

R0_StrenuousExerciseMinutes.x-question: Total time per week spent on strenuous exercise, ages [age range]? - minutes
R0_StrenuousExerciseMinutes.description: Weekly minutes of strenuous exercise ages [age range]

R0_LightExerciseDays.x-question: As an adult, on how many days per week do you do light exercise, ages [age range]?
R0_LightExerciseDays.description: Weekly days of light exercise ages [age range]

R0_LightExerciseHours.x-question: Total time per week spent on light exercise, ages [age range] - hours
R0_LightExerciseHours.description: Weekly hours of light exercise ages [age range]

R0_LightExerciseMinutes.x-question: Total time per week spent on light exercise, ages [age range]? - minutes
R0_LightExerciseMinutes.description: Weekly minutes of light exercise ages [age range]

R0_SportsSweatDays.x-question: In a typical week from April to September of last year, how much time did you spend on sports or training that made you sweat? - days

R0_SportsSweatHours.x-question: In a typical week from April to September of last year, how much time did you spend on sports or training that made you sweat? - hours

R0_SportsSweatMinutes.x-question: In a typical week from April to September of last year, how much time did you spend on sports or training that made you sweat? - minutes

R0_WorkSweatDays.x-question: In a typical week from April to September of last year, how much time did you spend at work doing activities that made you sweat? - days

R0_WorkSweatHours.x-question: In a typical week from April to September of last year, how much time did you spend at work doing activities that made you sweat? - hours

R0_WorkSweatMinutes.x-question: In a typical week from April to September of last year, how much time did you spend at work doing activities that made you sweat? - minutes

R0_OtherSweatDays.x-question: In a typical week from April to September of last year, how much time did you spend doing other activities that made you sweat? - days
R0_OtherSweatDays.description: Weekly days of sweat-inducing other activities

R0_OtherSweatHours.x-question: In a typical week from April to September of last year, how much time did you spend doing other activities that made you sweat? - hours
R0_OtherSweatHours.description: Weekly hours of sweat-inducing other activities

R0_OtherSweatMinutes.x-question: In a typical week from April to September of last year, how much time did you spend doing other activities that made you sweat? - minutes
R0_OtherSweatMinutes.description: Weekly minutes of sweat-inducing other activities

R0_ExerciseWinterComparison.x-question: Do you exercise more, less, or the same in winter?
